section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Corporate Identity Number (CIN) of the Listed Entity
placeholder_text: Enter the 21-character alphanumeric CIN issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). Ensure it matches the certificate of incorporation.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Name of the Listed Entity
placeholder_text: Provide the legal name of the listed entity as per the certificate of incorporation and stock exchange listings.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Year of incorporation
placeholder_text: Enter the calendar year (YYYY) in which the entity was incorporated. This should match the incorporation certificate.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Registered office address
placeholder_text: Provide the complete registered office address as per MCA records. Include street, city, state, and PIN code.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Corporate address
placeholder_text: Provide the main corporate/business address if different from registered office. Include all relevant details for correspondence.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: E-mail
placeholder_text: Enter the official email address for BRSR-related correspondence. Use a generic email like sustainability@company.com rather than personal emails.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Telephone
placeholder_text: Provide the official contact telephone number with STD/ISD codes. Include both landline and mobile if available.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Website
placeholder_text: Enter the complete website URL of the listed entity (e.g., https://www.company.com). Ensure the link is active.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Financial year for which reporting is being done
placeholder_text: Specify the financial year in format FY 2025-26 or April 2025 - March 2026. Should align with statutory financial reporting period.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Name of the Stock Exchange(s) where shares are listed
placeholder_text: List all stock exchanges where the entity's shares are listed (e.g., BSE, NSE, NYSE). Separate multiple entries with commas.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Paid-up Capital
placeholder_text: Enter the paid-up share capital in Indian Rupees (Rs.) as per the latest audited balance sheet. Do not include share premium.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Name and contact details (telephone, email) of the person who may be contacted for BRSR queries
placeholder_text: Provide full name, designation, telephone number, and email ID of the key contact person responsible for BRSR reporting and queries.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Reporting boundary: standalone or consolidated basis
placeholder_text: Select 'Standalone' if reporting only the listed entity, or 'Consolidated' if reporting includes all subsidiaries. Choose based on your reporting practice.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Name of assurance provider
placeholder_text: Enter the name of the external assurance provider (if any). If not assured, enter 'Not assured' or 'Nil'.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Type of assurance obtained
placeholder_text: Specify the type of assurance (e.g., Limited Assurance, Reasonable Assurance, GRI certified, or None). Mention the standard used if applicable.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Details of business activities (accounting for 90% of the turnover)
placeholder_text: Provide details of business activities/segments that collectively account for 90% or more of the total turnover. Include NIC codes if available.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Products/Services sold by the entity (accounting for 90% of turnover)
placeholder_text: List the main products/services that contribute to 90% of the turnover. Include categories, descriptions, and percentage contribution.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Number of locations where plants and/or operations/offices of the entity are situated
placeholder_text: Provide the count of locations (plants, offices, operations) by state/UT within India and by country for international locations.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Markets served by the entity: number of locations (national/international)
placeholder_text: Specify the number of locations/markets served nationally (state-wise) and internationally (country-wise).

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Contribution of exports as a percentage of total turnover
placeholder_text: Enter the percentage of total turnover contributed by exports. Calculate as (Export Revenue / Total Turnover) × 100.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Brief on types of customers
placeholder_text: Provide a brief description of the customer base (e.g., B2B, B2C, Government, Retailers, Wholesalers). Mention key customer segments.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Employees and workers (including differently abled) as at end of financial year
placeholder_text: Provide headcount of permanent employees, permanent workers, temporary/contractual employees and workers by gender at the end of the financial year.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Differently abled employees and workers as at end of financial year
placeholder_text: Provide headcount of differently abled/disabled employees and workers by category (physical, intellectual, visual, hearing, etc.) and gender.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Participation/Inclusion/Representation of women (Board of Directors, KMP)
placeholder_text: Provide numbers of women on Board of Directors, in Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) positions, and other senior management roles.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Turnover rate for permanent employees and workers
placeholder_text: Provide the turnover/attrition rate for permanent employees and workers, segregated by gender and category. Calculate as (separations/average headcount) × 100.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Names of holding/subsidiary/associate companies/joint ventures
placeholder_text: List the names of all holding companies, subsidiaries, associate companies, and joint ventures with their relationship to the listed entity.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Whether CSR is applicable as per section 135 of Companies Act, 2013
placeholder_text: Select 'Yes' if the entity meets the criteria for CSR applicability (net worth > Rs. 500 Cr, turnover > Rs. 1000 Cr, or net profit > Rs. 5 Cr), else 'No'.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Turnover (in Rs.)
placeholder_text: Enter the total turnover of the entity in Indian Rupees as per the latest audited financial statements (for CSR applicability check).

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Net worth (in Rs.)
placeholder_text: Enter the net worth of the entity in Indian Rupees as per the latest audited balance sheet (for CSR applicability check).

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Complaints/Grievances on any of the principles (Principles 1 to 9)
placeholder_text: Provide details of complaints/grievances received during the financial year categorized by each principle (P1-P9), status, and resolution.

section_name: General Disclosures
question_text: Overview of the entity's material responsible business conduct issues (risks/opportunities)
placeholder_text: Provide a summary of material ESG/sustainability risks and opportunities identified, along with their impact and management approach.

placeholder_text: For each principle, indicate if a policy exists (Yes/No/Under Development) and provide a brief description of the policy coverage.

section_name: Management and Process Disclosures
question_text: Has the policy been approved by the Board?
placeholder_text: Select 'Yes' if the policies listed above have been formally approved by the Board of Directors. Otherwise select 'No'.

question_text: Web link of the policies, if available
placeholder_text: Provide the URL where the policies are publicly available on the entity's website. If not available, mention 'Not available'.

placeholder_text: For each principle, indicate whether the policy has been translated into operational procedures/guidelines (Yes/No/Partially).

placeholder_text: For each principle, indicate if the policy applies to value chain partners (Yes/No/Partially). If 'No' for any, provide reason.

placeholder_text: List codes/certifications/standards (e.g., ISO 14001, SA8000, GRI) adopted by the entity for each principle. Mention the standard and applicability.

section_name: Management and Process Disclosures

placeholder_text: For each principle, list specific ESG/sustainability commitments, goals, and targets with their timelines (e.g., reduce carbon emissions by 30% by 2030).

placeholder_text: For each principle, provide progress/performance against the commitments, goals, and targets set. Include achievements and gaps.

placeholder_text: Provide a statement from the responsible director covering ESG challenges, targets set, achievements, and the way forward. This is a narrative section.

section_name: Management and Process Disclosures

placeholder_text: Select 'Yes' if there is a specific Board Committee (e.g., Sustainability Committee, ESG Committee) responsible for sustainability decisions. Else 'No'.

placeholder_text: For principles where no policy exists, provide reasons for not having a policy. Leave blank if policy exists for all principles.
